\begin{table}[h]
    \centering
    \caption{{Zero-shot performance of Pythia-160M and Sheared-Pythia.}}
    \begin{tabular}{@{}lccc@{}}
    \toprule
                   & Training Tokens & Performance \\ \midrule
    Pythia-160M    &        300B                     & 43.56       \\
    Sheared-Pythia &        (300B) + 10B                    & 43.51       \\
    Sheared-Pythia &        (300B) + 33B                   & \textbf{45.78}       \\ \bottomrule
    \end{tabular}
    \label{tab:pythia}
\end{table}
